caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Choppy Seas in Western Caribbean
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing east winds near 22 kt, seas to 5.8 ft with a 9 s east swell, and a 50% rain probability. I expect the strongest impacts at Roatan while Grand Cayman reports winds near 17 kt, and I advise mariners to anticipate building chop and brief heavy showers.

mediterranean.headline: Northeast Swells and 25 kt Winds Near Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing NNE-dominant swells with sustained winds around 25 kt, seas to 5.6 ft and a 6 s swell period; less than 10% rain probability. I advise caution for small craft and exposed shoreline operations, and I note Venice is the runner-up with sustained winds near 26 kt.
